_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Document and address organization's information security, cybersecurity architecture, and systems security engineering requirements throughout the acquisition lifecycle.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.499), DA-T-001 (DA, cosine: 0.492).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.521). Shared vocabulary: [requirements, security]. DCWF-only terms [acquisition, address, architecture, cybersecurity, document, engineering] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.886, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:64.7%, C:35.2%). No dominant classification for "Document and address organization's information security, cybersecurity architec" vs "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.537 ≈ STS 0.521 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [requirements, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [requirements, security]. DCWF-only: [acquisition, address, architecture, cybersecurity, document, engineering]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise].
